_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the My7steps App, as evidenced by the title 'My7steps App Trial Study' and multiple mentions of the product name in the full text. The study aims to test the effectiveness of the My7steps App for depressive symptoms, developed by My7steps GmbH.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a controlled, randomized, two-arm study with a parallel group design, using block randomization and allocation concealment, which are defining features of an RCT.
